title: Create Discord channels for the Podlet dev team and the community
body:
In the last Podman community meeting (2026-02-03) I already suggested to create Discord channels for the `Podlet` project, so the developers and the community can use the same collaboration tools as the Podman and Podman-Desktop teams do.

We would like to get these two Discord channels:

- `podlet`
- `podlet-dev`

CC: @k9withabone
